response.justification: Exceptional fit with 20 years of full-stack development experience and current role directly aligned with job requirements. Demonstrates mastery of primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and actively works on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. Minor gaps in explicit Vitest and Nest.js experience are easily addressable given demonstrated testing framework depth and Node.js expertise.
strengths: Current Staff role at re:cinq explicitly involves TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching core job needs
20 years of software development with 6+ years specifically in required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, MongoDB, SQL)
Exceptional testing and TDD expertise demonstrated through custom test frameworks, Jest proficiency, Selenium mastery, and teaching testing workshops
concerns: Vitest not explicitly mentioned on resume, though strong Jest background and testing framework experience suggest quick adoption
Nest.js framework not specifically highlighted; Node.js experience is primarily raw framework and other patterns
Security and authentication best practices not explicitly detailed despite being a core requirement

key_factors.factor: Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and full-stack TypeScript/Node.js development
Exceeds 6+ year requirement with 14+ years in exact required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, cloud, containers)
Missing explicit Vitest and Nest.js framework experience
